originalTitle: Nigerian police arrest 15 after viral videos of alleged sexual assault at festival
title: Nigerian police arrest 15 after viral videos of alleged sexual assault at festival
content: The videos sparked widespread anger, leading to the hashtag #StopRapingWomen to trend on social media.

originalTitle: Kenyan ex-foreign minister arrested and accused of staging his disappearance
title: Kenyan ex-foreign minister arrested and accused of staging his disappearance
content: The reported disappearance of Raphael Tuju had led to claims he may have been abducted.

originalTitle: Ex-teacher accused of Scotland school abuse found guilty of sex attack in South Africa
title: Ex-teacher accused of Scotland school abuse found guilty of sex attack in South Africa
content: A court in Cape Town found Iain Wares guilty of indecently assaulting a former student who accused him of sexual abuse in the 1980s.

originalTitle: How Israel is reacting to Trump’s  ‘de-escalation’ with Iran
title: How Israel is reacting to Trump’s  ‘de-escalation’ with Iran
content: There is expected to be pushback from Israel following President Donald Trump’s move towards de-escalation with Iran.

originalTitle: Israeli strike on Lebanon bridge raises fears of ground invasion
title: Israeli strike on Lebanon bridge raises fears of ground invasion
content: Lebanon fears that Israel’s attack on Qasmiyeh Bridge could be a “prelude to a ground invasion”.

originalTitle: Which countries have strategic oil reserves – and how much?
title: Which countries have strategic oil reserves – and how much?
content: Members of the International Energy Agency have agreed to release 400 million barrels of oil from strategic reserves.

originalTitle: Oil falls and shares rebound after Trump says talks have been held to end war
title: Oil falls and shares rebound after Trump says talks have been held to end war
content: Energy prices fall and stock markets rebound after the US president says "very good and productive" talks have been held.

originalTitle: UN warns Earth's climate being 'pushed beyond its limits' as El Niño looms
title: UN warns Earth's climate being 'pushed beyond its limits' as El Niño looms
content: The Earth's climate is further out of balance than at any time in recorded history, the UN's weather agency says.

originalTitle: HK police can now demand phone passwords under new national security rules
title: HK police can now demand phone passwords under new national security rules
content: Those who do not comply can be jailed for up to a year and fined up to HK$100,000 ($12,700; £9,600).

originalTitle: Have Chelsea progressed under Rosenior? Analysing his Blues tenure
title: Have Chelsea progressed under Rosenior? Analysing his Blues tenure
content: Liam Rosenior is facing criticism for his early tenure as Chelsea manager - but is it fair, and are his players on board ahead of the climax to the season?

originalTitle: Sunderland not very good compared with Newcastle - Gordon
title: Sunderland not very good compared with Newcastle - Gordon
content: Anthony Gordon says Newcastle United's defeat by rivals Sunderland is "not good enough" because the Black Cats are "not very good" compared with the Magpies.

originalTitle: Foden final appearance felt like a 'charity' substitution - Rooney
title: Foden final appearance felt like a 'charity' substitution - Rooney
content: Phil Foden's injury-time appearance in Manchester City's Carabao Cup final victory over Arsenal felt like a "charity" substitution, says former England captain Wayne Rooney.
